'''âv-g-b''' ('''kavagab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulver|pulver]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulver|pulver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-g-b
|-
! Lemma
| kavagab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivagab|thivagab]] || [[word:jivagab|jivagab]] || [[word:shivagab|shivagab]] || [[word:kivagab|kivagab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvagab|thuthuvagab]] || [[word:jujuvagab|jujuvagab]] || [[word:shushuvagab|shushuvagab]] || [[word:kukuvagab|kukuvagab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvagab|thuvagab]] || [[word:juvagab|juvagab]] || [[word:shuvagab|shuvagab]] || [[word:kuvagab|kuvagab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvagab|thuvagab]] || [[word:juvagab|juvagab]] || [[word:shuvagab|shuvagab]] || [[word:kuvagab|kuvagab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevagab|thevagab]] || [[word:jevagab|jevagab]] || [[word:shevagab|shevagab]] || [[word:kevagab|kevagab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovagab|thothovagab]] || [[word:jojovagab|jojovagab]] || [[word:shoshovagab|shoshovagab]] || [[word:kokovagab|kokovagab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovagab|thovagab]] || [[word:jovagab|jovagab]] || [[word:shovagab|shovagab]] || [[word:kovagab|kovagab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovagab|thovagab]] || [[word:jovagab|jovagab]] || [[word:shovagab|shovagab]] || [[word:kovagab|kovagab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvagab|thĂŠvagab]] || [[word:jĂŠvagab|jĂŠvagab]] || [[word:shĂŠvagab|shĂŠvagab]] || [[word:kĂŠvagab|kĂŠvagab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavagab|thathavagab]] || [[word:jajavagab|jajavagab]] || [[word:shashavagab|shashavagab]] || [[word:kakavagab|kakavagab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavagab|thavagab]] || [[word:javagab|javagab]] || [[word:shavagab|shavagab]] || [[word:kavagab|kavagab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavagab|thavagab]] || [[word:javagab|javagab]] || [[word:shavagab|shavagab]] || [[word:kavagab|kavagab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavagab|shavagab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavagab|goshavagab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavagab|gokishavagab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavagabnĂŒ|shavagabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavagabnknĂŒ|goshavagabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavagabnĂŒ|gokishavagabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavagabshĂ«|shavagabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavagabnkshĂ«|goshavagabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavagabshĂ«|gokishavagabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavagabro|shavagabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavagabnkro|goshavagabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavagabro|gokishavagabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavagabmu|shavagabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavagabnkmu|goshavagabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavagabmu|gokishavagabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavagabsher|shavagabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavagabnksher|goshavagabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavagabsher|gokishavagabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavagabng|shavagabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavagabnkng|goshavagabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavagabng|gokishavagabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavagabya|shavagabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavagabnkya|goshavagabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavagabya|gokishavagabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavagabyam|shavagabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavagabnkyam|goshavagabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavagabyam|gokishavagabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavagabnĂŒshĂ«|shavagabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavagabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavagabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavagabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavagabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavagabnĂŒro|shavagabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavagabnknĂŒro|goshavagabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavagabnĂŒro|gokishavagabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavagabnĂŒmu|shavagabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavagabnknĂŒmu|goshavagabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavagabnĂŒmu|gokishavagabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavagabshĂ«nĂŒ|shavagabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavagabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavagabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavagabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavagabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavagabshĂ«ro|shavagabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavagabnkshĂ«ro|goshavagabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavagabshĂ«ro|gokishavagabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavagabshĂ«mu|shavagabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavagabnkshĂ«mu|goshavagabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavagabshĂ«mu|gokishavagabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavagabronĂŒ|shavagabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavagabnkronĂŒ|goshavagabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavagabronĂŒ|gokishavagabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavagabroshĂ«|shavagabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavagabnkroshĂ«|goshavagabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavagabroshĂ«|gokishavagabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavagabromu|shavagabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavagabnkromu|goshavagabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavagabromu|gokishavagabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavagabmunĂŒ|shavagabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavagabnkmunĂŒ|goshavagabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavagabmunĂŒ|gokishavagabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavagabmushĂ«|shavagabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavagabnkmushĂ«|goshavagabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavagabmushĂ«|gokishavagabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavagabmuro|shavagabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavagabnkmuro|goshavagabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavagabmuro|gokishavagabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
